nasb.text: You shall remember that you were a slave in the land of Egypt; therefore I am commanding you to do this thing.

esv.text: You shall remember that you were a slave in the land of Egypt; therefore I command you to do this.

cnv.text: 你要記住你在埃及作過奴僕，所以我吩咐你遵行這話。”

ccb.text: 要记住，你们曾在埃及做过奴隶。所以，我吩咐你们这样行。
